title: DN31 2TT, Lenzing Fibers Grimsby Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/SP3936HE/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Lenzing Fibers Grimsby Limited Installation name:Energy Park Way Permit number: EPR/SP3936HE/V004  "
